article_title: Ascendis Pharma Launches YUVIWEL in the US, Bringing the First Weekly Injection for Achondroplasia to Market with Seven-Year Orphan Exclusivity

content_preview.title: Ascendis Pharma Launches YUVIWEL in the US, Bringing the First Weekly Injection for Achondroplasia to Market with Seven-Year Orphan Exclusivity
content_preview.summary: The first once-weekly treatment for achondroplasia is now commercially available in the United States after Ascendis Pharma secured orphan drug exclusivity through 2033.
content_preview.body_excerpt:
## Overview

Ascendis Pharma announced on April 6, 2026 that it has received orphan drug exclusivity from the U.S. Food and Drug Administration and commercially launched YUVIWEL (navepegritide) in the United States, according to a [company press release](https://www.globenewswire.com/news-release/2026/04/06/3268705/0/en/Ascendis-Receives-Orphan-Drug-Exclusivity-and-Launches-YUVIWEL-Navepegritide-in-the-United-States.html). YUVIWEL is the first and only once-weekly treatment approved to increase ...
